equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: exposure and cryptographic verification are present, but one required rejection path is absent.

checked_queries: delivery_spc_calls receipt storage verifier at most one
delivery SPC proofs verified allow at most one
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Delivery SPC calls are exposed through transaction, receipt, and storage paths and are verified, but the verifier does not enforce the required at-most-one delivery_spc_call rule.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/rpc/rpc-eth-types/src/receipt.rs exposes delivery_spc_calls and storage codecs compact/decompact them.
crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs verifies a matching delivery SPC proof but does not reject extra delivery_spc_calls.

notes: This gap is distinct from missing exposure; the missing behavior is the verifier cardinality rule.
rationale: The merge populates delivery_spc_calls from pool delivery proof metadata when creating delivery settlements, adds transaction accessors and compact storage support, includes delivery_spc_calls in receipts, and extends verification to validate proof shape and feed delivery proofs into the shared SPC signature pipeline keyed by origin_tx_hash. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Every Phase 2 delivery settlement that includes delivery_spc_calls must expose them through transaction/receipt/storage paths and block verification must treat them like normal SPC calls: require origin_tx_hash, allow at most one delivery SPC call, reject too-short proofs or missing executor addresses, and verify the signature using origin_tx_hash as the AsyncJobTracker job key rather than the settlement transaction hash.
suggested_falsification_tests: Build a delivery settlement with a valid delivery proof and assert the receipt exposes delivery_spc_calls and block verification accepts it; then test missing origin_tx_hash, two delivery_spc_calls, a short proof, a zero/missing executor address, and a proof signed for the settlement hash instead of origin_tx_hash, all of which must reject the block.
summary: Delivery SPC proof paths lack the at-most-one rejection guard.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Persist and verify a delivery settlement containing two delivery_spc_calls and assert verification fails even if one proof is valid.
title: Delivery SPC proofs are verified
